0.name: pick_up_left
0.text: Pick up the card on the left side.

1.name: pick_up_right
1.text: The card on the right should be lifted from the table.

3.name: push_10
3.text: Move the 10-value chips to the front.

4.name: push_50
4.text: For the chips of value 50, slide them ahead.

5.name: push_100
5.text: Your target is the 100-point chips; send them outward.

7.name: pull_10
7.text: Bring the 10-value chips back toward yourself.

8.name: pull_50
8.text: For the chips of value 50, draw them inward.

9.name: pull_100
9.text: The 100-point chips are the target; retrieve them toward you.

10.name: put_down_left
10.text: Place the held card onto the left position.

11.name: put_down_right
11.text: The held card should be returned to the right side.

12.name: show_left
12.text: Reveal the face of the left card.

13.name: show_right
13.text: Make the right card visible by turning it toward the viewer.
